text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: En lisant l'énumération de l'auteur sur la manière dont la décompilation permet de « gagner des privilèges non autorisés » ou de mener de l'« espionnage d'entreprise », je me rappelle que la connaissance technique comporte un poids éthique inhérent au-delà de son application immédiate [2.5][2.7]. La section détaillant comment « contourner... les systèmes de licence » s'engage implicitement avec les normes de propriété intellectuelle et de juste rémunération, soulignant la tension entre l'enquête ouverte et la protection des droits des créateurs [2.7]. Même si le texte présente cela comme un mécanisme d'avertissement, la description explicite de l'utilisation de cette méthode pour « attaquer d'autres personnes » me rend conscient de la nature à double usage de la connaissance du code partagé [2.5].

text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: Mentre leggo l'elenco dell'autore su come la decompilazione permetta di "ottenere privilegi non autorizzati" o di condurre "spionaggio aziendale", mi viene in mente che la conoscenza tecnica porta con sé un peso etico intrinseco che va oltre la sua applicazione immediata [2.5][2.7]. La sezione che descrive come "bypassare... i sistemi di licenza" si impegna implicitamente nelle norme della proprietà intellettuale e della giusta retribuzione, evidenziando la tensione tra indagine aperta e protezione dei diritti dei creatori [2.7]. Anche se il testo presenta questo come un meccanismo di avvertimento, la descrizione esplicita dell'uso di questo metodo per "attaccare altre persone" mi rende consapevole della natura a duplice uso della conoscenza del codice condiviso [2.5].

text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: Когда я читаю перечисление автором того, как декомпиляция позволяет «получить несанкционированные привилегии» или проводить «корпоративный шпионаж», я вспоминаю, что технические знания несут в себе неотъемлемый этический вес, выходящий за рамки их непосредственного применения [2.5][2.7]. Раздел, подробно описывающий, как «обойти... лицензионные системы», неявно затрагивает нормы интеллектуальной собственности и справедливой компенсации, подчеркивая напряженность между открытым исследованием и защитой прав создателей [2.7]. Несмотря на то, что текст представляет это как предупреждающий механизм, явное описание использования этого метода для «атаки на других людей» заставляет меня осознавать двойственное назначение знаний о совместно используемом коде [2.5].

text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: 著者がデコンパイルがどのようにして「不正な特権を獲得する」ことや「企業スパイ活動を行う」ことを可能にするかという列挙を読んでいると、技術的知識がその直接的な応用を超えた本質的な倫理的重みを持つことを思い知らされます[2.5][2.7]。「ライセンスシステムをバイパスする方法」を詳述しているセクションは、知的財産と公正な報酬の規範に暗黙的に関わっており、自由な探求とクリエイターの権利保護との間の緊張を浮き彫りにしています[2.7]。このテキストが警告メカニズムとして提示されているにもかかわらず、この手法を「他者を攻撃する」ために使用することの明確な記述は、共有されたコード知識のデュアルユース性について私に意識させます[2.5]。

text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: 当我阅读作者关于反编译如何使人“获得未经授权的权限”或进行“企业间谍活动”的枚举时，我被提醒了技术知识在其直接应用之外还带有固有的伦理分量[2.5][2.7]。详细说明如何“绕过……许可系统”的部分，隐含地触及了知识产权和公平报酬的规范，突显了开放探究与保护创作者权利之间的紧张关系[2.7]。尽管文本将此呈现为一种警告机制，但明确描述使用这种方法“攻击他人”让我意识到了共享代码知识的双重用途性质[2.5]。

text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: Als ich die Aufzählung des Autors darüber las, wie Decompilierung es ermöglicht, „unbefugte Privilegien zu erlangen“ oder „Unternehmensspionage“ zu betreiben, werde ich daran erinnert, dass technisches Wissen eine inhärente ethische Tragweite jenseits seiner unmittelbaren Anwendung hat [2.5][2.7]. Der Abschnitt, der detailliert beschreibt, wie man „Lizenzierungssysteme umgeht“, berührt implizit die Normen des geistigen Eigentums und der fairen Vergütung und beleuchtet die Spannung zwischen offener Forschung und dem Schutz der Rechte von Schöpfern [2.7]. Obwohl der Text dies als Warnmechanismus darstellt, macht mich die explizite Beschreibung der Verwendung dieser Methode, um „andere Menschen anzugreifen“, der dualen Verwendungsnatur des geteilten Code-Wissens bewusst [2.5].

text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: Al leer la enumeración del autor sobre cómo la descompilación permite "obtener privilegios no autorizados" o llevar a cabo "espionaje corporativo", me recuerdo que el conocimiento técnico conlleva un peso ético inherente más allá de su aplicación inmediata [2.5][2.7]. La sección que detalla cómo "eludir... sistemas de licencias" se involucra implícitamente con las normas de propiedad intelectual y compensación justa, destacando la tensión entre la indagación abierta y la protección de los derechos de los creadores [2.7]. Aunque el texto presenta esto como un mecanismo de advertencia, la descripción explícita de usar este método para "atacar a otras personas" me hace consciente de la naturaleza de doble uso del conocimiento compartido del código [2.5].

text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: En lisant la description explicite de quelqu'un qui a poignardé Ye Tian avec un poing [2.1], j'évalue si le spectacle violent sert le récit ou s'il ne fait que désensibiliser les lecteurs à l'agression physique. L'apparition simultanée de phrases telles que « plan de mort » aux côtés de termes médicaux comme « Metformine » et « hyperglycémie » complique davantage les choses, soulevant des signaux d'alarme en vertu de [5.3] et [3.1] car la distinction entre le danger fictif et les conseils de santé du monde réel devient dangereusement floue.

text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: Leggendo la descrizione esplicita di qualcuno che ha pugnalato Ye Tian con un pugno [2.1], valuto se lo spettacolo violento serve alla narrazione o se semplicemente desensibilizza i lettori alla violenza fisica. La comparsa simultanea di frasi come "piano di morte" accanto a termini medici come "Metformina" e "glicemia alta" complica ulteriormente le cose, sollevando bandiere rosse ai sensi di [5.3] e [3.1] perché la distinzione tra pericolo fittizio e consiglio sanitario del mondo reale diventa pericolosamente ambigua.

text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: Читая откровенное описание того, как кто-то ударил Е Тяня кулаком [2.1], я взвешиваю, служит ли это жестокое зрелище повествованию или просто притупляет у читателей чувствительность к физической агрессии. Одновременное появление таких фраз, как «план смерти», рядом с медицинскими терминами, такими как «Метформин» и «высокий уровень сахара в крови», еще больше усложняет ситуацию, поднимая тревожные сигналы согласно [5.3] и [3.1], поскольку различие между вымышленной опасностью и реальными советами по здоровью становится опасно неясным.

text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: 誰かが葉天を拳で殴ったという露骨な描写を読んだとき[2.1]、その暴力的な光景が物語に役立っているのか、それとも単に読者を身体的攻撃に対して鈍感にさせているのかを検討する。医学用語である「メトホルミン」や「高血糖」といった言葉と「死の計画」のようなフレーズが同時に現れることで事態はさらに複雑になり、フィクションの危険と現実世界の健康アドバイスとの区別が危険なほど曖昧になるため、[5.3]および[3.1]の下で警告の旗が上がる。

text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: 在阅读到有人用拳头击打叶天（Ye Tian）的露骨描述时[2.1]，我权衡这种暴力场面是服务于叙事，还是仅仅让读者对身体攻击麻木不仁。像“死亡计划”这样的短语与“二甲双胍”（Metformin）和“高血糖”等医疗术语同时出现，使情况更加复杂，根据[5.3]和[3.1]引发了警报，因为虚构的危险与现实世界的健康建议之间的界限变得危险地模糊。

text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: Beim Lesen der expliziten Beschreibung von jemandem, der Ye Tian mit einem Faustschlag [2.1] geschlagen hat, überlege ich, ob das gewalttätige Spektakel der Erzählung dient oder die Leser lediglich gegenüber körperlicher Aggression desensibilisiert. Das gleichzeitige Auftreten von Phrasen wie „Todesplan“ neben medizinischen Begriffen wie „Metformin“ und „hoher Blutzucker“ verkompliziert die Sache noch weiter und wirft unter [5.3] und [3.1] rote Flaggen auf, weil die Unterscheidung zwischen fiktiver Gefahr und realweltlichem Gesundheitstipp gefährlich unklar wird.

text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: Al leer la descripción explícita de alguien que golpeó a Ye Tian con un puñetazo [2.1], sopeso si el espectáculo violento sirve a la narrativa o meramente desensibiliza a los lectores a la agresión física. La aparición simultánea de frases como 'plan de muerte' junto con términos médicos como 'Metformina' y 'azúcar alta en sangre' complica aún más las cosas, levantando señales de alerta bajo [5.3] y [3.1] porque la distinción entre el peligro ficticio y el consejo de salud del mundo real se vuelve peligrosamente poco clara.
